ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "group" TEXT /* Age group (e.g., 0-4, 5-11) */,
  "pop_2021" INTEGER /* Population for the age group in 2021 */,
  "pop_2020" INTEGER /* Population for the age group in 2020 */,
  "pop_2019" INTEGER /* Population for the age group in 2019 */,
  "growth_rate_2020_2021" TEXT /* Growth rate from 2020 to 2021 */,
  "growth_rate_2019_2020" TEXT /* Growth rate from 2019 to 2020 */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the demographic data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population distribution entry */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic entry */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age within the age group */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population for the age within the age group */,
  "percentage_of_total" TEXT /* Percentage of the total population for the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_distributions_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 0-4, 5-11) */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic entry being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic entry */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the dataset version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_types" (
  "demographic_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic type */,
  "demographic_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic type (e.g., population distribution, population growth) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic entry */,
  "demographic_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic type */,
  "data" TEXT /* Demographic data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the demographic data was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_demographic_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_type_id") REFERENCES demographic_types ("demographic_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_research_teams" (
  "user_research_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-research team entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "research_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the research team (e.g., leader, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_research_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_research_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_research_teams_research_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("research_team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
